Meaning: Every other cast — the 2nd, 4th, 6th … (Yorick's BIG ghoul).
The 4th cast of the combat (Annie's passive arms itself there) — the cast-count sibling of 'On 3rd Cast'.
The champion was HIT by an attack. The mirror of 'On Attack', which is the champion attacking — Amumu stacks Armor when attacked, not when attacking.
